_comment: Renderer preference list for live-media format slots. The backend catalog owns each active AVIF, WebP, and PNG version; this file contains no accepted pointer and no filesystem fallback.

targets.note: Full-bleed accepted background scene (~2.6MB PNG); opaque, photographic.
Carved-stone rail/tab surface (~440KB PNG, opaque). Single heaviest menu image; gates the buttons layer in the cold-load reveal. Higher quality preserves the 1024px tile under `repeat`.
